recommendations.title: Flyboys
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, History, Romance, War
recommendations.overview: The adventures of the Lafayette Escadrille, young Americans who volunteered for the French military before the U.S. entered World War I, and became the country's first fighter pilots.

recommendations.title: Detachment
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of three weeks in the lives of several high school teachers, administrators and students through the eyes of substitute teacher, Henry Barthes. Henry roams from school to school, imparting modes of knowledge, but never staying long enough

recommendations.title: Full of It
recommendations.overview: A teenager tells outrageous lies at his new high school, only to have them suddenly come true.

recommendations.title: El Bola
recommendations.overview: El Bola  is a 12-year-old boy raised in a violent and sordid environment. Embarrassed by his family life, he avoids becoming close to classmates. The arrival of a new boy at school changes his attitude towards his classmates and friendship.
